[Keurig Dr Pepper 2025 Performance Update]
Here's what stands out: 27 consecutive years of dividend increases. Yield above 5% with steady EPS growth. Defensive packaging business

[As 2025 comes to a close, I'm proud to share ...]
As 2025 comes to a close, I’m proud to share that, for the first time, our iconic Dr Pepper brand has received two industry-leading honors: Fast Company’s 2025 Brands That Matter and the 2025 Kantar BrandZ Most Valuable Brands list. A powerful recognition of what makes Dr Pepper so unique. At KDP, we’re focused on building iconic, consumer-loved brands and Dr Pepper embodies that ambition. These h

[Keurig Dr Pepper Reports Strong Q4 2025 Results]
Today, we shared our Q4 results—and I’m proud to say that 2025 was another strong year for Keurig Dr Pepper. Today we shared our Q4 and full year earnings results. Despite a very dynamic operating environment characterized by cost inflation, incremental tariffs and a challenged consumer, we achieved our guidance on both sales and earnings per share growth. These transformation, we announced the ac

[Keurig Dr Pepper reveals 2025 flavor innovations - Vending Times]
# Keurig Dr Pepper reveals 2025 flavor innovations. Keurig Dr Pepper unveiled its flavor lineup for 2025 in the U.S., featuring additions to several of its brands, including Dr Pepper, 7Up, A&W, Snapple, Bai and RC Cola, according to a Food Manufacturing report. The flavors, which will be available nationally, include Dr Pepper Blackberry, 7UP Tropical, Snapple Peach Tea & Lemonade, Bai Simbu Stra
